#### `circleci orb unlist <namespace>/<orb> [flags]`

Hide or restore an orb in the registry

| Flag        | Description                                       |
| ----------- | ------------------------------------------------- |
| `--restore` | restore the orb's visibility instead of hiding it |


**Arguments:**

- `<namespace>/<orb>` is the orb to update, for example, `namespace/orb-name`
